popularStory.headline: From the Stewart Society
popularStory.description: Elizabeth Mure, the 1st wife (though never queen) of Robert II, is a shadowy figure of whom little is known. Her father was Sir Adam Mure of Rowallan and she was probably born in about 1315, the year …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan於1320年3月2日出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可時，她的父親Adam Mure 2nd Baron of Rowallan25歲，母親Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie25歲。她於1347年11月22日與Robert II Stewart King of Scotland在蘇格蘭艾斯爾凱爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1354年在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾登東納爾德享年34歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Mure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French muer ‘mewer’, i.e. someone who tended to hawks in the cages in which they were kept while moulting. Compare Mew .

variants.name: Mura
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Akio, Hideo, Masao, Nanako, Tsutomu, Yoshi.  French Alphonse, Amie, Henri.
German: altered form of some similar (like-sounding) German or perhaps French surname. It is also common in France (Alsace), where it was first recorded in the form Morrau, later Murra(w).
Italian (southern Sardinia): topographic name or nickname from Sardinian mura ‘mulberry’ or ‘blackberry’.

variants.name: Muir
meanings: Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived on a moor, from Older Scots muir ‘moor’ (an expanse of bare, wild upland country). There has been some confusion with Mure .

variants.name: Morea
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Saverio, Domenic, Ferdinando, Rocco.  Spanish Manuel, Carlos, Cesar, Elvira, Jesus, Mauricio.

Italian (Apulia): from the personal name Morea, originally a habitational name from Morea, the medieval name of the Greek region of Peloponnese, named as the land of mulberry trees, from mōrea ‘mulberry’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from any of the places called Morea, in Badajoz, Navarre, and Lleida provinces.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan was born on 2 March 1320, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Adam Mure 2nd Baron of Rowallan, was 25 and her mother, Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie, was 25. She married Robert II Stewart King of Scotland on 22 November 1347, in Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1354, in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 34, and was buried in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan est née le 2 mars 1320, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Adam Mure 2nd Baron of Rowallan, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Robert II Stewart King of Scotland le 22 novembre 1347, à Kyle, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1354, à Dundonald, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan am 2. März 1320 in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam Mure 2nd Baron of Rowallan 25 und ihre Mutter Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie 25. Sie hat am 22. November 1347 in Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland Robert II Stewart King of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1354 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Robert II Stewart King of Scotland il 22 novembre 1347, nel Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Mure of Rowallanが1320年3月2日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックで生まれた時，父Adam Mure 2nd Baron of Rowallanは25歳，母Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellieは25歳であった。1347年11月22日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクイルでRobert II Stewart King of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1354年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアダンドナルドで34歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーペイスリー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Paisley Abbey, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리 파이슬리 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan(이)가 1320년 3월 2일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam Mure 2nd Baron of Rowallan(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1347년 11월 22일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 키일에서 Robert II Stewart King of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1354년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 던도널드에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리 파이슬리 애브브이에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Robert II Stewart King of Scotland em 22 de novembro de 1347, em Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. ru.Paisley Abbey, Renfrewshire, Scotland: пеисли эбби, пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan родилась 2 марта 1320 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Adam Mure 2nd Baron of Rowallan было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert II Stewart King of Scotland 22 ноября 1347 г. в местности кил, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1354 г. в местности дундональд, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности пеисли эбби, пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
